actionPlan.title: Research
tasks: Research Emirates Group on LinkedIn and company website
Find 3-5 LSE/Newcastle alumni at the company
Identify the hiring manager if possible

actionPlan.title: Connect with Alumni
tasks: Send connection requests to 2-3 LSE alumni found
Use Message Type 1 (LSE alumni message)
Send connection requests to 2-3 Newcastle alumni
Use Message Type 2 (Newcastle alumni message)
Do NOT mention the job application yet

actionPlan.title: Apply
tasks: Submit the job application for Business Development Manager via the apply URL
Use Auto-Fill feature from the dashboard
Attach CV and cover letter
Note the application in the tracker

actionPlan.title: Follow up on connections
tasks: Check if alumni accepted connection requests
If accepted: send a follow-up message mentioning the application naturally
Connect with HR Manager if found via contactFinder

actionPlan.title: Engage with company content
tasks: Like and comment on Emirates Group recent LinkedIn posts
Follow Emirates Group official LinkedIn page
This increases profile visibility to recruiters

actionPlan.title: Second wave outreach
tasks: If no response from alumni: try 1-2 more connections
Send cold outreach to HR Manager using Message Type 3
Check application status in tracker

actionPlan.title: Review and escalate
tasks: If no response to application: send follow-up email
Use the follow-up template from appTracker.js
Connect with senior leaders at Emirates Group on LinkedIn
Move to next priority job if no response
